text.tspan: Total official flows commitments for aid for trade, by donor, 2022
Gross disbursements and commitments of total Official Development Assistance (ODA) from all donors for aid
for trade. This data is expressed in US dollars. It is adjusted for inflation but does not account for differences in
Data source: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
Note: This data is expressed in constant 2022 US$.
